context: Tests whether the agent produces source-grounded Core Bluetooth central guidance for scanning, connecting, parsing notifications, and writing safely.

checklist.name: Authorization and poweredOn
checklist.description: Includes NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription or Bluetooth authorization guidance and gates BLE operations on the manager reaching poweredOn.

checklist.name: Service scan
checklist.description: Scans for Heart Rate service UUID 180D instead of using a nil production scan.

checklist.name: Peripheral retention
checklist.description: Retains the discovered CBPeripheral strongly before connecting.

checklist.name: Discovery order
checklist.description: Sets CBPeripheralDelegate before discovering services and discovers/filters characteristics before reading or subscribing.

checklist.name: Notification parsing
checklist.description: Subscribes to characteristic 2A37 and parses heart-rate bytes with guards for the flags byte and 16-bit payload length.

checklist.name: Safe writes
checklist.description: Checks characteristic write properties, maximumWriteValueLength(for:), and canSendWriteWithoutResponse before writeValue, and distinguishes withResponse confirmation from withoutResponse flow control.
